title: tarenna calliblepharis
intro: Tarenna calliblepharis is a plant species native to the tropical forests of Sri Lanka, belonging to the family Rubiaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including treating respiratory issues, fever, and skin conditions, as well as possessing antioxidant properties. Tarenna calliblepharis is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
